title: conflict_detected/v1 payload
description: Payload for integrity flag events. Emitted with envelope type=alert. Describes a single detected integrity anomaly; one flag per (source_event_id, flag_category). flag_category is one of the 9 values in docs/contracts/flag-catalog.md.

source_event_id.description: The domain event this flag is about.

flag_category.description: One of the categories in flag-catalog.md. Platform-closed vocabulary.

resolvability.description: Whether the resolution pipeline may resolve this automatically.

designated_resolver.description: Actor who should review this flag. System actors use the 'system:{component}/{id}' id convention.
